npmInstallScripts.esbuild: Vite build dependency; install script selects platform package. Keep dev-only and covered by npm signatures.
npmInstallScripts.fsevents: Optional macOS file-watcher dependency from Vite/Rollup toolchain.

cargoExternalPaths.typeship: Sibling checkout used only for generated TypeScript binding tests in local/CI typegen.
cargoExternalPaths.typeship-ts-rs: Sibling checkout used only for generated TypeScript binding tests in local/CI typegen.
